training_status: training 5-6 days per week, weightlifting and swimming; mountain biking, surfing, CrossFit

benefits.description: DOMS has pretty much become a thing of the past
Can push harder, heavier and further; increased strength

protocol_notes: Age 46, testosterone levels before cycle in top 25% of normal range. Currently 2 weeks into cycle, expecting full benefits in ~4 more weeks. Planning to potentially cruise on TRT dose and blast again in future. Previously completed 8-week cycle of 10mg Ostarine/Cardarine at end of previous year. Wife has been cycling Anavar for almost a year. Has PCT drugs on hand.
